title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7155016161090866206","book_info":{"abstract":"【反派+架空+系统+夺嫡】
萧氏一族又双叒叕有人穿越了。
这次穿越的是萧玠。
他穿越成了一部架空爽文中的一个皇子。
但是他不是主角，主角是他的皇兄萧璜，一个受上天眷顾的位面之子。
他只是一个不入流的小反派
但好在俗话说得好，有反派的地方就会有系统。
只有不给力的系统和不努力的反派，没有对付不了的位面之子。
且看萧玠如何逆天改命……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/43e75d2faaee8a0109a32635aa481aac","author":"琅邪王","author_id":"","book_id":"7155016161090866206","book_name":"穿书第一剑，先斩猪队友","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#e0e0e8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.4万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":272,"name":"历史脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=272&name=历史脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":12,"name":"历史","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=12&name=历史&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":369,"name":"反派","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=369&name=反派&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":382,"name":"穿书","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=382&name=穿书&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7155028252850192931","read_count":"23883","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1127591"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.3","serial_count":"489","tags":"历史脑洞,历史,系统,穿越,反派,穿书,架空,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/4e29816a40a4d9b468936a10ca575951~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779499402&x-signature=aHO5f%2B%2FImm5Nw8Z4ZD48smwKVIw%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"4206742586","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"6.9650743e+07"},"log_extr
